name: True Driver
short_description: The game features several activities and challenges for you to complete using cars and heading to different locations to free your fun. Enjoy the world of True Driver and have fun!
detailed_description:
LOOK HERE!


We have prepared a fun little game full of challenges and activities to help you enjoy your evening. Fire it up and let's do it! WOOOHOO!

The game offers you 3 main activities, each with a bit of a difference. So you can choose between multiple options for your entertainment. How about embarking on a FREEMODE journey where you complete several smaller tasks? How about collecting coins like in an arcade game? Can you collect gas cans without running out of gas? You might find it challenging to collect all the checkpoints without touching any obstacles! PEEP PEEP find the lost car! Or just take a ride around the map, destroy your neighbor's fence or take a crazy jump. How about a race against time? Put yourself up to the challenge in the COUNTDOWN activity, where time is your opponent. Race against the clock in the city, the countryside, the desert, the beach or even the North Pole. WOW! The third activity is called HELI RACE. This time you have to defeat a helicopter, which doesn't always make the race easier. You may ask, what is your equipment? We offer you 4 sports cars of different colours. So get in and let's go!

Become a TRUE DRIVER, fasten your seatbelt and take on the challenges!

Thank you Valve, Unity technologies, asset creators and you players for helping me achieve my dreams. Thank you!
